name: How can I make my website easier for voice search without rebuilding everything?
description: Rewrite key headings as real questions, answer them in one or two sentences, and make contact details easy to find on mobile.

mainEntity.name: How can I make my website easier for voice search without rebuilding everything?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use plain-language headings, short answers, and questions that sound like something a real person would ask aloud. Review your site on a phone and remove anything that makes it hard to quickly find hours, contact details, and next steps.
acceptedAnswer.description: Rewrite key headings as real questions, answer them in one or two sentences, and make contact details easy to find on mobile.
